title: NHSE ICB COPD Digital Technology Fund
closing_date_note: August 2024 deadline has passed. Confirm whether further waves are available with NHS England.
description: NHS England funding to support ICBs in commissioning digital COPD technology. Clinitouch explicitly named as eligible technology. Other HTE19 apps — confirm eligibility with NHSE.
notes: Spirit Health can support ICBs in applying. Contact clinitouch@spirit-health.com. Confirm current availability of further funding waves with NHSE.

title: NICE HTE19 Evidence Generation Programme
closing_date_note: 3-year evidence generation period ends approximately December 2027.
description: All four NICE HTE19 COPD apps are in a 3-year evidence generation period. Commissioning organisations are expected to support evidence collection through annual reporting agreements with NICE. This is a condition of the HTE19 recommendation, not a grant funding opportunity.
notes: Annual NICE reporting is mandatory for all commissioning organisations deploying HTE19-recommended technologies. Evidence generation agreements must be in place before deployment.

title: SBRI Healthcare / NHS Accelerated Access Collaborative
closing_date_note: SBRI Healthcare runs periodic competitions. Check NHS England and Innovate UK for current open calls.
description: SBRI Healthcare funds NHS-embedded innovation contracts. Luscii holds an SBRI Phase 2 contract. Future SBRI calls may be relevant to other DTx in this catalogue.
notes: SBRI contracts typically involve NHS organisations co-developing and testing innovations. Check current open competitions.

title: Health Innovation Network adoption support
closing_date_note: Ongoing — contact your regional Health Innovation Network.
description: The 15 Health Innovation Networks across England support the adoption of NICE-approved innovations including digital health technologies. They can provide implementation support, facilitation and, in some cases, adoption funding for commissioners.
notes: Contact your regional Health Innovation Network for current support offers relevant to DTx adoption in your area.

title: NIHR Invention for Innovation (i4i) programme
sponsoring_body: National Institute for Health and Care Research (NIHR)
closing_date_note: Check NIHR website for current open calls.
description: NIHR i4i funds the development and evaluation of medical devices and digital health technologies. May be relevant to commissioners wishing to co-fund evidence generation for HTE19 technologies or for early-stage DTx evaluation.
notes: NIHR is one of several funding routes — not the only option. Check all routes listed in this directory.
